title: Jungle Leaves' Fruits
description: Bring back the fruits on the Jungle Leaves!
body:
The fruits on the Jungle leaves are like,,SUPER important to what the tree is.
The Jungle Tree is based on the Kapok, and ever since it was added to the game, it was _intended_ to have fruits since the start; but never was added properly.

*NOTE
this pack isnt MEANT to look really good, its to just show that it is possible to do this

and yes, you could use this for your own pack

I only released this because I was working on my own pack thatll be adding these back (as a variant to the leaves)

ANDANDNAND!!! This pack looks AWFUL with Fast Leaves enabled due to how Minecraft handles translucent textures
